title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-preprocess
description: Final step of #247. tests/api_proof.rs covering every public estimator (after orphan wiring): all scalers, all encoders (Binarizer, OneHot, Ordinal, Label, MultiLabel, Binary, Target), KBinsDiscretizer, SplineTransformer, PolynomialFeatures, FunctionTransformer, all imputers (Simple, KNN, Iterative), all feature selectors (VarianceThreshold, SelectKBest, SelectPercentile, SelectFpr/Fdr/Fwe, SelectFromModel, RFE, RFECV, SequentialFeatureSelector), text family (CountVectorizer, TfidfTransformer), random projection (Gaussian, Sparse), ColumnTransformer, plus the module-level scoring fns (f_classif, f_regression, chi2).
